LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DAVID VINER'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 17, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE ITS OPPOSITION. DEPARTMENT 302 HAS RECEIVED A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION, BUT THE OPPOSITION WAS NOT FILED, AS THE DOCUMENT DOES NOT APPEAR ON THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS. OPPOSING PARTY MUST FILE THE OPPOSITION BY MAY 22, 2014, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: JOYCE FINLEY #8620.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - DAVID VINER, TEL. NO. (925) 948-5001, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID VINER'S Motion To Dismiss is Denied. Defendant has not cited to any legal authority in support of his motion to dismiss based on the filing of his sworn denial signed April 10, 2014. " ' "[A] point which is merely suggested by [a party], with no supporting argument or authority, is deemed to be without foundation and requires no discussion." [Citation.]' [Citation.]" (Do It Urself Moving & Storage, Inc. v. Brown, Leifer, Slatkin & Berns (1992) 7 Cal.App.4th 27, 35, superseded by statute on other grounds in Union Bank v. Sup. Ct. (1995) 31 Cal.App.4th 573, 582.). Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Continued To Jun-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Viner, defendant in propria persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID VINER's Motion To Dismiss is continued to June 17, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to file its opposition. Department 302 has received a courtesy copy of the opposition, but the opposition was not filed, as the document does not appear on the Court's Register of Actions. Opposing party must file the opposition by May 22, 2014, or the motion will be granted. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.
